name: German-Style Hasenpfeffer
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Sour cream or evaporated milk
recipeInstructions:
1 Heat vegetable oil in a large pan.
2 When hot, add bay leaf, garlic clove, spice clove, bacon, carrots, and mushrooms.
3 Add rabbit and simmer until browned.
4 Pour the solution of vinegar mixed with water over the meat.
5 Cover pan and simmer until tender.
6 Before removing pan from heat, add sour cream or evaporated milk.
7 Serve hot with dumplings or large noodles.
